# Forma Atelier - LLM Information File

## Project Overview
Forma Atelier is a modern fashion e-commerce platform built with Astro, React, and TailwindCSS. It utilizes Firebase (Auth & Firestore) for its backend and Stripe for payments. The website serves as a minimalist, luxury fashion storefront showcasing contemporary, architectural designs from Barcelona.

## Technical Stack
- **Framework**: Astro (Static generation with SSR endpoints where needed)
- **UI Library**: React (interactive islands)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS (custom design system, `bg-ivory`, `text-noir`)
- **Backend & Auth**: Firebase
- **Payments**: Stripe Elements & Payment Intents
- **Animations**: GSAP (GreenSock) for scroll and interaction animations
- **Hosting**: Vercel (`https://forma-atelier-bcn.vercel.app`)

## Sitemap & Routes
- `/` - Home Page (Manifesto, Featured Selection)
- `/collections` - Browse by collection (Lumière, Ombra, Terra)
- `/lookbook` - Visual gallery of looks
- `/atelier` - About the brand and craftsmanship
- `/products/[slug]` - Dynamic product pages with detailed views
- `/checkout` - Stripe integrated checkout flow
- `/cart` & `/wishlist` - Client-side state management for shopping

## Semantic Guidelines
- All images are high-resolution `.avif` for modern compression.
- The design strictly adheres to a light mode aesthetic (ivory background, dark text).
- Strict SEO best practices including JSON-LD schema (WebSite, Organization, Product), OpenGraph, and Twitter Cards are globally integrated.
